channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Man shot during prayer service, suspects at large: Police
item.description: A 26-year-old man was shot multiple times while attending a prayer service in Minnesota, and the suspects are at large, authorities said.

item.title: Key findings from AP probe into sharp rise in ICE detainee suicides
Income needed to buy a home in 49 major U.S. cities
item.description: An average-earning household would need to spend 40% of its income to afford a typical U.S. home, Redfin reports.

item.title: New NatGeo documentary showcases glacier beauty
item.description: "Time and Water" follows an Icelander's mission to document glaciers as a time capsule for future generations amid climate change.
